title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. communis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. communis, also known as kidney vetch or red clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is widely distributed across Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. communis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
